issues.detail: gloss_en is 'humming' (gerund) but should be verb base form 'hum'

gloss_en 'bug out' is wrong — German gloss 'etwas von Wanzen befreien' means 'to rid something of bedbugs/bugs'. Should be 'de-bug' or 'rid of bedbugs'. gloss_en_full 'To free something of bedbugs' is correct.

synonyms_en ['slim person', 'skinny person', 'thin individual', 'lean person'] are wrong — these were copied from Dünner_dünne. This sense means diarrhea/loose stool (der Dünne = colloquial for Durchfall). synonyms_en should contain diarrhea-related terms instead.
Translation has 'a audible click' — should be 'an audible click'
Translation has 'an very uncomfortable' — should be 'a very uncomfortable'

Translation 'The mastermind is sitting on a swing' is wrong for this context. The German 'Der Drahtzieher sitzt auf der Schaukel' here likely means the wire-drawer (literal sense), not mastermind — unless it is figurative. If it is sense 1 (Handwerker), translation should be 'The wire drawer is sitting on the swing.'
Annotations 'bienenstock' (lemma 'bienenstock') and 'bienen' (lemma 'bienen') use lowercase German nouns — should be 'Bienenstock' (noun, lemma 'Bienenstock') and 'Bienen' (noun, lemma 'Biene')
'Transformator' annotation has gloss_hint 'operation' — should be null (Transformator has only one sense, disambiguation not needed)
Annotation for 'wanzen': form 'wanzen' has lemma 'wanz' — should be lemma 'wanzen'
Annotation 'Mahlzeit' has lemma 'meal' (English) — should be lemma 'Mahlzeit'
'laue' annotation has lemma 'laue' — should be lemma 'lau' (the adjective base form)
'im' is annotated as pos 'abbreviation' — should be pos 'preposition' (or omitted, as it's a contraction of 'in dem')
'Ende' has lemma 'end' (English) — should be lemma 'Ende'. 'Verhandlung' has lemma 'trial' (English) — should be lemma 'Verhandlung'
'Ensemble' has lemma 'ensemble' (lowercase) — should be lemma 'Ensemble'. 'Stück' has lemma 'piece' (English) — should be lemma 'Stück'
'simulierte' annotated as pos 'verb' — it is an adjective form here (simulierte Ensemble). Should be pos 'adjective', lemma 'simuliert'
'kaum' annotated as pos 'verb' — should be pos 'adverb'
'Berichten' annotated as lemma 'berichten' pos 'verb' — in this sentence it is dative plural of 'Bericht' (noun). Should be lemma 'Bericht', pos 'noun'
'Degen' annotation has lemma 'degen' (lowercase) — should be 'Degen'. 'Gebrauch' has lemma 'gebrauchen' (verb) — should be lemma 'Gebrauch' (noun)
'ich' and 'mir' annotated as pos 'noun' — should be pos 'pronoun'
'Kerl' has lemma 'guy' (English) — should be lemma 'Kerl'. 'Hüfte' has lemma 'hip' (English) — should be lemma 'Hüfte'
All annotations use English forms/lemmas ('shrinks', 'economy', 'shrink', 'economies', 'global', 'crisis') — should use German forms and lemmas from the German source text
All annotations use English forms/lemmas ('always', 'diligent', 'student') from the translation, not the German source sentence
All annotations use English forms/lemmas ('simulated', 'ensemble', 'piece', 'theater', 'performed') from the translation, not the German source sentence
All annotations use English forms/lemmas ('curfew', 'imposed', 'city', 'week') from the translation, not the German source sentence
All annotations use English forms/lemmas ('desire', 'possession', 'power', 'drives', 'actions', 'humans') from the translation, not the German source sentence
All annotations use English forms/lemmas ('sword', 'fencing', 'weapon', 'pointed', 'tip') from the translation, not the German source sentence
All annotations use English forms/lemmas ('mastermind', 'operation', 'arrested') from the translation, not the German source sentence
'Dünnen' annotated as pos 'adjective' lemma 'dünn' — in this sentence it is a substantivized adjective (noun usage). Should be pos 'noun', lemma 'Dünner'
'einer' annotation has gloss_hint 'solo boat' — should be null (it's an article/determiner here, not the noun 'Einer')

'vorauszusagen' has lemma 'voraussehen' — wrong lemma, should be 'voraussagen'. 'nutzt' has gloss_hint 'behave' — wrong, should be null or 'use'. 'Flugverhaltens' has gloss_hint 'behavior' and Algorithmus has gloss_hint 'control system' — these are imprecise but not critical
